char_overview: A 写影师 who transcribes 灵力回路 onto physical media. Her archive maps 灵能者 weaknesses, serves the entire 帮会.
char_looks: Black hair combed tight and tucked behind ears, premature threads of gray. Thin, pale face, pale brown eyes. Dark gray high-collared coat. None.
char_flaws: Hoards 灵力回路 transcriptions, considers them her property, not 齿轮's. Obsessively verifies every line, delaying projects. Uncomfortable with direct eye contact.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-写影: Visualizes and transcribes a target 灵力回路 pattern onto tracing paper with 灵力-infused ink. Observation time varies with 灵力回路 complexity.
char_mission: Expand the 灵力回路 archive. Serve as 齿轮's information broker: anyone can learn a rival's 灵力回路 before facing them, for a price.

char_relationships.锻: Found him drinking alone in a 锈钟 bar weeks after he walked out of 狩灵协会3科. Recognized the quench burns before the name, a bladesmith the 狩灵协会 had thrown away. Copied his 灵力回路, far beyond standard templates, and brought him 月: someone who needed a blade, someone who needed a reason to light the furnace again.
char_relationships.狩灵协会4科: Former employer, left when a superior proposed using her 灵力回路 archive to analyze assassination targets. The officer who gave that order is still alive because 写乐 never copied his 灵力回路.
